raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Homelessness is a crisis in California.",
    "Encampments near sensitive community areas such as schools, parks, libraries, and daycare centers pose risks to children.",
    "The proposed SB 31 aims to compassionately clear encampments and connect homeless individuals with necessary services.",
    "A 72-hour warning will be required before clearing an encampment to allow homeless individuals time to find alternatives and services.",
    "Enforcement officers will be required to provide information about sleeping alternatives and mental health services during encampment sweeps."
  ]
}
```
